calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Davidson for Christina Hom.

The Court expressed concern stating there is no question that the property was intentionally put in the Trust, and that some time ago about fourteen years before the Trustors death, the property was taken out of the Trust for the specific purpose of obtaining refinancing for a strategic benefit. Ms. Davidson stated that the settlors did not intend to take the property out of the Trust, that her Clients did not understand, that English is their second language, that they put the property in the Trust to avoid probate and that taking it out was done at the instruction of the lender. The Court stated that there is no evidence of an intent in putting the property back in the Trust and that the consent of the Beneficiary is not relevant. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
